AU_EDISCHEMA.au_xsd: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="ISO-8859-1"?> <xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified"> <xs:include schemaLocation="shared/EDISchemas/EDIFACT_D09A/EDIFACT_D09A_ORDERS.xsd"/> <xs:element name="EDIRoot"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <xs:standard>D09A ORDERS</xs:standard> <xs:isHIPPA>False</xs:isHIPPA> <xs:documentation>D09A ORDERS</xs:documentation> <xs:fieldSeparator></xs:fieldSeparator> <xs:segmentSeparator></xs:segmentSeparator> <xs:compositeSeparator></xs:compositeSeparator> <xs:subCompositeSeparator></xs:subCompositeSeparator> <xs:repetitionSeparator></xs:repetitionSeparator> <xs:transactionEndSeparator></xs:transactionEndSeparator> <xs:releaseIndicator></xs:releaseIndicator> <xs:validateXML>false</xs:validateXML> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="UNB" type="UNB" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs ="1"/> <xs:element name="UNG" type="UNG" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs ="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="TS_ORDERS" type="TS_ORDERS" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs ="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="UNE" type="UNE" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs ="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="UNZ" type="UNZ" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs ="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>
